name: Ginseng Shreds Stir Rice - for a Special Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam and simmer the pre-steamed rice.
2. Add 1 heaping tablespoon of vegetable oil to a skillet over medium heat and stir the rice for 1-2 minutes until heated through. Remove from heat.
3. Heat the remaining vegetable oil in the same skillet over medium heat until hot. Add the finely chopped ginseng, onions, peppers, celery, and salt. Stir for 2 minutes until combined.
4. Cover the skillet and let the mixture sit for 7 minutes. The dish is ready to serve.
5. Note that nearly all Chinese soups and stews can be adapted with ginseng, except those containing citrus fruits as an ingredient. Experiment by trying out recipes from a Chinese cookbook.
The Ginseng Book: Louise Veninga, Ruka Publications, 1973.
